author: Aum Desai
name: Looped Transformer Design (non tuned at all)
blurb: Non-record 10-minute submission: a PR315-derived looped transformer with a shared recurrent core, partial RoPE, LN scaling, late QAT, XSA4, and bigram features. It stays under the 16,000,000-byte cap and reaches 1.1462 sliding-window exact BPB without exhaustive tuning.
